data.title: Former rugby player sentenced for running $900k crypto mining Ponzi scheme, promising 1% daily returns to teammates for luxury purchases.
data.description: Shane Moore lured fellow rugby players with the prospect of 1% daily returns before misappropriating their funds for luxury apartments and designer items.

data.title: Electrolux Group Q2 2025 report: Net sales of SEK 31,276m, 1.8% organic growth; North America and Latin America up, Europe, Asia-Pacific slightly down.
data.description: In the second quarter of 2025, there were significant financial developments. Net sales for the period totaled SEK 31,276 million, which shows a decrease from the previous year's SEK 33,819 million. The organic sales growth rate was 1.8%, a notable drop from the previous period's 6.8%. The growth in sales was primarily fueled by strong performances in North America and Latin America. However, this growth was dampened by a decrease in sales in the European and Asia-Pacific regions.

data.title: Husqvarna Group's Q2 2025 net sales decrease by 1% to SEK 15,277m, organic sales increase by 5%, operating income reaches SEK 2,063m.
data.description: In the second quarter of 2025, in Stockholm, a company experienced positive organic growth and enhanced profitability. Despite a 1% decline in net sales to SEK 15,277 million from SEK 15,430 million, there was a significant organic sales growth of 5%. The impact of exchange rate fluctuations was -6%. Operating income for the specified period was SEK 2,063 million, marking an improvement from SEK 1,899 million previously.

data.title: Aker BP shares go ex-dividend today at USD 0.63 per share (NOK 6.36193), payment by 28 July 2025. Contact: Kjetil Bakken.
data.description: LYSAKER, Norway - On July 18, 2025, Aker BP ASA's (OSE: AKRBP) (OTCQX: AKRBF) shares will be traded without the entitlement to the dividend of USD 0.63 (NOK 6.36193) per share. The ex-dividend date is today, with the payment scheduled for around July 28, 2025. For further information, reach out to Kjetil Bakken, the Head of Investor Relations.

data.title: Rapidus achieves milestone with prototyping of 2nm transistors, hitting targets for 2027 mass production.
data.description: Rapidus Corporation, a company based in Tokyo, recently achieved success with the initial prototypes showcasing promising electrical properties. Their progress aligns with their objective to commence mass production by 2027. The corporation specializes in manufacturing cutting-edge logic semiconductors and made this announcement on July 18, 2025. This development marks a significant milestone for the company as they advance towards their production goals.

data.title: Telia Lietuva reports financial results for the first half of 2025 following IFRS; details undisclosed.
data.description: Telia Lietuva's Board has authorized the unaudited Interim Financial Statements for the company, following International Financial Reporting Standards adopted by the EU, for the 6-month period concluding on June 30, 2025.

data.title: Coop Pank's unaudited Q2 2025 report shows 218,000 customers, up by 5,000 (+2%) in the quarter and by 22,000 (+11%) in the year. They also had 103,600 active customers, increased by 1,800 (+2%) in the quarter and by 8,300 (+9%) in the year.
data.description: As of the second quarter of 2025, Coop Pank saw a rise in their customer base to 218,000, with an increase of 5,000 customers during the quarter, indicating a 2% growth. Throughout the year, the bank gained 22,000 new customers, signifying an 11% increase. They also reported a total of 103,600 active customers, with a quarterly growth of 1,800 customers (2% increase) and a yearly growth of 8,300 customers (9% increase).

data.title: Telenor sees strong Q2 results, raises EBITDA outlook, invests NOK 1.4 billion in Finland, acquires GlobalConnect for NOK 6 billion.
data.description: In Fornebu, Norway, on July 18, 2025, Telenor Group achieved impressive performance in the second quarter of 2025, leading to an increased EBITDA forecast for both the Nordics and the Group. Concurrently, the company strengthens its presence in the Nordic fiber market through a substantial NOK 1.4 billion multi-year commitment in Finland and the recent NOK 6 billion purchase of GlobalConnect's consumer division in Norway.

data.title: New Bitfinex mobile app update 7.13.0 includes major improvements and bug fixes for better user experience.
data.description: Bitfinex has launched the latest Version 7.13.0 of its mobile app, which includes notable enhancements and bug fixes aimed at improving user experience and functionality. The update brings significant improvements to the app, marking a step forward in enhancing the overall usability and performance for users. This version is geared towards providing a smoother and more efficient experience, with various bug fixes that contribute to a more seamless app usage. The new update aims to address issues and further optimize the app to meet the needs of users, indicating a commitment to continuously improving their services.

data.title: Algorand (ALGO) up by 30% after upgrades and staking expansion on platforms like Binance and Crypto.com amidst challenges. Bulls eye 2025.
data.description: Algorand (ALGO) has seen a significant 30% increase in value after recent network enhancements and the introduction of new staking options on popular platforms like Binance and Crypto.com. The positive momentum has been maintained despite obstacles such as Tether's USDT withdrawal. This development underscores growing confidence in the cryptocurrency, with investors showing strong interest in the upgraded features and staking opportunities provided.

data.title: Trump plans to add crypto to 401(k) plans, opening up $8.7 trillion retirement market to Bitcoin, Ethereum, and other assets.
data.description: President Donald Trump is set to sign an executive order allowing cryptocurrencies to be part of U.S. retirement plans this week. The move, as reported by the Financial Times, will enable 401(k) plans to broaden their investments beyond the usual stocks and bonds. This order will facilitate investments in various asset classes such as digital assets, metals, corporate takeovers, private loans, and infrastructure deals. Regulatory agencies will be directed to find and eliminate any barriers impeding the inclusion of alternative investments. This initiative aims to offer greater diversification opportunities for retirement savings in the country.

data.title: BlackSky raises $160 million in upsized convertible senior notes offering to institutional buyers. #BKSY #financenews
data.description: In Herndon, Virginia, BlackSky Technology Inc. (NYSE: BKSY) revealed the pricing details of $160 million principal worth of 8.25% Convertible Senior Notes due 2033. This was achieved through a private offering to qualified institutional buyers under Rule 144A of the Securities Act of 1933. The initial offering size of $125 million aggregate was upsized to $160 million.

data.title: Injective (INJ) price skyrockets by 15% post EVM testnet launch and bullish momentum. Market optimism prevails amid July 17 announcement anticipation.
data.description: Injective (INJ) has experienced a significant 15% increase in value after launching the EVM testnet and a bullish technical breakout. Speculation around a forthcoming announcement on July 17 has contributed to positive market sentiment for the cryptocurrency.

data.title: Worldcoin (WLD) up 25% on key partnerships with Razer and Match Group, but regulatory risks loom in Europe.
data.description: Worldcoin (WLD) has experienced a significant 25% increase in value this week, attributed to recent collaborations with industry giants Razer and Match Group.
